comparables.condition: Good — recently updated kitchen and baths
comparables.notes: Sold close to list. Kitchen fully renovated 2022. No major deferred maintenance. Comp skews high vs subject due to updates.

comparables.condition: Below average — needed roof and HVAC at time of sale
comparables.notes: Sold below ask after price reduction. Inspector flagged roof and furnace, buyer negotiated $18K credit. Closest comp to subject's situation.
Larger home, 4BR, newer roof, multiple offers. Comp skews high — not a direct match to subject.

comparables.condition: Average — original everything, no major repairs
comparables.notes: Smaller home, detached garage, slightly different street. Sat on market similar to subject. Useful lower anchor.

comparables.condition: Average — some deferred maintenance, no major systems replaced
comparables.notes: Same street as subject, nearly identical floor plan. Most direct comp. Sold in fall, slight seasonal softness may mean spring sale could push slightly higher.

analysis.marketCondition: Neutral — slight buyer's market in this price band. Average DOM in area is 38 days; subject has been sitting 64 days with two price reductions.
analysis.notes: Subject's deferred maintenance (roof, panel, basement, furnace) places it closer to comp_002 and comp_004 range. Current list price of $289K appears slightly aggressive given condition. Fair market value accounting for known repair needs likely $270K–$282K.
